ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID for the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Exchange ID where the company is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the company */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the industry belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which securities are traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., annual report, quarterly report) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the financial report */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the financial report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., earnings report, dividend announcement) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event that triggered the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend payment was made */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment per share */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security price record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for the company */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date for which the security price is recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_prices_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES companies ("symbol")
)
